hero.title:
Thaynan
Passos
Software Systems
hero.lead: Systems Development student at IFPE, currently interning at Sesc Pernambuco's Digital Technology Unit. From the support desk to the codebase — building solutions that actually work.
about.title:
From tech support
to development
about.p1: I'm a Systems Analysis and Development student at IFPE. I currently intern at Sesc Pernambuco's Digital Technology Unit, where I work on internal platform configuration, technical documentation, software testing, and WordPress hotsite maintenance. Before that, I spent over 4 years as a technical support assistant at UFPE (STI/NATI-CB) — which gave me a real understanding of how systems work under the hood.
about.p2: That routine led me to study programming seriously. I have a solid base in logic, Python, Java, SQL, and Git, which I apply both at my internship and in personal projects — always looking to grow in software development and process automation.
about.fact1: Paulista, PE, Brazil — Driver's license (Cat. B)
about.fact4: 4+ years of experience in IT support and infrastructure
